name: Fruit and Cheese Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup pineapple tidbits in juice, drained
1 Large pita bread, split in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together cottage cheese, cheddar cheese, kiwifruit, pineapple tidbits, and chives.
2. To serve, place lettuce leaves in the pita halves.
3. Spoon the fruit and cheese mixture into the pitas.
4. Makes 2 servings.
5. Note: 1/2 cup strawberries may be substituted for the kiwi fruit and green onion may be substituted for the chives.
